title: Chunk Save Fix
description: 1.20 port of Chunk Saving Fix. Fixes MC-224729.
body:
# Chunk Save Fix
1.20.1 port of the https://github.com/jaskarth/chunksavingfix-fabric/tree/main mod, fixes https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-224729

Fixes a chunk save bug that can cut off features like trees in certain chunks.

Thanks to my friend elocindev for coding the port
